heading_path: 问题三的模型建立与求解 / 求解与结果
masked_text:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00430:c982766a32c0]]
这里的 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00431:68e2c657635f]] 是无量纲综合控制参数，不直接对应某一河段的实测承载力。固定当前参数组并取代表点后，[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00432:0258bf576734]] 附近对应规则有界振荡，[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00433:eeb71f8d18e5]] 附近对应明显周期振荡；更高 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00434:68e2c657635f]] 下轨道会呈现更不规则的波动，但严格的混沌识别留到问题四通过最大李雅普诺夫指数完成。也就是说，问题三承担的是[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00435:78ea34104dad]]，而不是直接给出混沌判据。为避免只凭图像判读，这里统一在尾窗 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00436:b39b373d174e]] 上提取 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00437:369b8c11e233]] 的峰谷差 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00438:20ccad4982a1]]、平均峰间隔 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00439:3fa96c72a5cc]] 和峰间隔变异系数 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00440:5a1728719c77]] 作为观测型描述量，如表 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00441:1de3ec717af9]] 所示。

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00442:ff2eb9e78880]]{table}[htbp]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00443:444090bde130]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00444:a95360f059e6]]{问题三代表轨道的尾窗描述量}
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00445:240cfc8f27da]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00446:9bd6563a665b]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00447:ff2eb9e78880]]{tabularx}{0.95[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00448:db686cb84689]]}{>{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00449:e13c04e5f7fa]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00450:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{2.9cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00451:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00452:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.2cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00453:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00454:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.4cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00455:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00456:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.4cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00457:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00458:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.3cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00459:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00460:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.5cm} >{[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00461:444090bde130]][[PROTECTED:F00001-P00462:4afb314fdcd4]]}p{1.4cm}}
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00463:3000c3bd47e8]]
类型 & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00464:68e2c657635f]] & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00465:b0ac1fd3479c]] & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00466:20ccad4982a1]] & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00467:d2e90f4c3476]] & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00468:3fa96c72a5cc]] & [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00469:5a1728719c77]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00470:b11b4ca186c0]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00471:3f9db2ae5742]]
规则有界振荡 & 1.795 & 0.261 & 0.991 & 4 & 20.720 & 0.004 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00472:b11b4ca186c0]]
明显周期振荡 & 2.665 & 0.502 & 2.092 & 3 & 34.178 & 0.014 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00473:b11b4ca186c0]]
不规则样本 & 4.800 & 0.885 & 4.093 & 13 & 4.298 & 2.746 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00474:b11b4ca186c0]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00475:76ac79294e9f]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00476:06b3847e1b6f]]{tabularx}
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00477:a67d86cbf941]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00478:06b3847e1b6f]]{table}

表 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00479:1de3ec717af9]] 显示，随着 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00480:68e2c657635f]] 增大，[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00481:369b8c11e233]] 的标准差由 0.261 升至 0.885，峰谷差由 0.991 扩大到 4.093，而峰间隔变异系数由 0.004 升至 2.746，说明系统从规则振荡逐步走向更不规则的长期行为。需要强调的是，第三行仅作为不规则样本展示，不在问题三中直接下混沌结论；是否进入混沌候选区间，仍以问题四的李雅普诺夫扫描为准。图 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00482:9ade67a4bf97]] 的上半部分服务于问题三的代表轨道展示，下半部分的李雅普诺夫扫描属于问题四判据，不作为问题三单独的混沌证据。

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00483:ff2eb9e78880]]{figure}[htbp]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00484:444090bde130]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00485:c58e7e916d20]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00486:a95360f059e6]]{问题三共用代表轨道与问题四李雅普诺夫扫描}
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00487:acf9f6504e88]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00488:06b3847e1b6f]]{figure}
read_only_context_before:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00424:7d00b3dbb993]]
为判别长江简单食物链长期行为，采用 Hastings-Powell 三层模型[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00425:14442c7e6a3c]]：
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00426:74532863bf15]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00427:77e3f17feb69]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00428:1645e28d05cc]]
其中 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00429:68e2c657635f]] 代表基础食物链有效承载力，可理解为营养输入、水质改善或污染冲击后的综合结果。
